# utils.plotting.bootstrap_scatter_plot { #ammonyte.utils.plotting.bootstrap_scatter_plot }

```python
utils.plotting.bootstrap_scatter_plot(
    series,
    ax=None,
    marker_color=None,
    transition_interval=None,
    scatter_kwargs=None,
    ci_kwargs=None,
    background_series=None,
    background_kwargs=None,
)
```

Plot RQA results highlighting points outside bootstrap confidence bounds as a scatter

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**series**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[pyleoclim](`pyleoclim`).[Series](`pyleoclim.Series`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Series object containing the timeseries to plot.

<code>[**ax**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[matplotlib](`matplotlib`).[axes](`matplotlib.axes`).[Axes](`matplotlib.axes.Axes`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Axes to plot on. If None, a new figure will be generated.

<code>[**marker_color**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`) or [tuple](`tuple`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   String or RGB tuple to use for the marker colour.

<code>[**transition_interval**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[list](`list`) or [tuple](`tuple`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   (upper, lower) bounds for the transition interval. If None, computed automatically via bootstrapping using ci_kwargs.

<code>[**scatter_kwargs**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Keyword arguments for the scatter plot.

<code>[**ci_kwargs**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Keyword arguments for calculating the confidence interval. Only used if transition_interval is not passed. See ammonyte.utils.sampling.confidence_interval for details.

<code>[**background_series**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[pyleoclim](`pyleoclim`).[Series](`pyleoclim.Series`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Optional series to plot behind the main series.

<code>[**background_kwargs**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Keyword arguments for the background plot. If not passed, the colour of the main plot will be reused and alpha will be set to 0.2.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[**fig**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[matplotlib](`matplotlib`).[figure](`matplotlib.figure`).[Figure](`matplotlib.figure.Figure`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The figure object from matplotlib. See `matplotlib.pyplot.figure <https://matplotlib.org/stable/api/figure_api.html>`_ for details.

<code>[**ax**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[matplotlib](`matplotlib`).[axes](`matplotlib.axes`).[Axes](`matplotlib.axes.Axes`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The axis object from matplotlib. See `matplotlib.axes <https://matplotlib.org/stable/api/axes_api.html>`_ for details.

## See Also {.doc-section .doc-section-see-also}


ammonyte.utils.sampling.confidence_interval

[[source]](https://github.com/LinkedEarth/Ammonyte/blob/main/ammonyte/utils/plotting.py#L193-L303){.source-link target="_blank"}
